form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation third of 24 at Flemington in the G1 Melb Cup November 4 over 3200m, soft track; 4.5 len behind Half Yours with 54.5kg at $26. Previously first up; fifth of 14 at this track Qlty August 30 over 2000m, soft track; 3 len behind Revelare with 62kg at $11. Might need this one, watch betting.
